subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The banners of pain have been raised upon the hills of sorrow, and the dawning-places of glory have been effaced and obliterated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد ارتفع اعلام الالام علی تلول الاحزان و انطمس و اندرس طلول المجد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
